article.title: BeyondTrust Patches Critical Auth Bypass Flaws in Remote Support and PRA
article.description: BeyondTrust has released updates to address two critical security flaws affecting Remote Support (RS) and Privileged Remote Access (PRA) products that, if successfully exploited, could allow unauthenticated attackers to take control of susceptible devices. The vulnerabilities are listed below - CVE-2026-40138 (CVSS score: 9.2) - A pre-authentication vulnerability exists in the

generated.caption:
Here's your Instagram caption:

Imagine an attacker taking control of your remote support tools without even needing a password! 🤯

BeyondTrust has just released urgent updates to patch two critical security flaws in their Remote Support (RS) and Privileged Remote Access (PRA) products. These serious vulnerabilities, if exploited, could allow unauthenticated attackers to completely take over susceptible devices.

One of the issues, identified as CVE-2026-40138 (with a high CVSS score of 9.2), is a pre-authentication vulnerability. This means an attacker could potentially bypass login requirements to gain unauthorized access.

If your organization uses BeyondTrust RS or PRA, it's absolutely critical to apply these updates immediately to protect your systems from potential compromise. Don't delay!

Stay secure and informed! Save this post, share it with colleagues who use BeyondTrust, and follow @CyberShieldAlerts for daily cybersecurity, AI security, and threat intelligence updates!
generated.script: Major security alert! Unauthenticated attackers could be taking full control of your devices. BeyondTrust just patched two critical security flaws in their Remote Support and Privileged Remote Access products. These vulnerabilities, including CVE-2026-40138, have a CVSS score of 9.2. This means bad actors could exploit them without needing any login credentials, allowing them to seize complete control of your susceptible systems. The risk of full system takeover is extremely high. Protect your network now. Update your BeyondTrust Remote Support and PRA products immediately to patch these critical flaws and secure your systems.
